creator: mhorne@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Gary Jennejohn from comment #3)

Thanks, understood. I was looking at that bug too and I am still not sure what is going wrong here...

I should have asked before, but can you share the verbose dmesg output from a clean boot (non-panic)? It is important to see the CPU family/model details.

There is already some discussion on the other PR, so if your panic is identical I will close this one and please share the dmesg there. Thanks!

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 273544 ***
